author: mark
text: Sync protocol §7.3/§7.4: state-first push order, half-push detection (warns when state close has no matching [bl-xxx] on main). Simplified auto_resolve_conflicts_at for delete/modify. Unified remove_task, git_rm_force, collapsed git_merge_inner into classify_merge, removed unused git_merge_no_ff + message arg. Coverage 96.83% -> 98.58%. All new modules 100%. Line limits clean, clippy clean. 286 tests pass.
